title: Bolbitis lomarioides
taxonomy: Bolbitis lomarioides is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae. It belongs to the genus Bolbitis, which is a group of ferns. The plant is native to tropical regions, particularly in Southeast Asia. Bolbitis lomarioides is a type of epiphytic fern that grows on other plants. It is also known as a climbing fern due to its unique habit of growing up vertical supports.
